content.query:
SELECT
lower(lds.Division) as division
,lower(lds.LeadID) as Lead_id
,lower(lds.CustomerID) as Prospect_id
,case 
    when [Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else [Phone]
end as [phone_id]
,[Email] as [email_id]
,[FirstName] as first_name
,[LastName] as last_name
,[Address1] as address1
,[Address2] as address2
,[City] as city
,[State] as [state]
,[Zip] as zip
,[Zip4] as zip4
,[FirstName]+' '+[LastName] as full_name
,[LP_DateAdded] as lp_dateadded
,[LP_LastChanged] as lp_datechanged
,lower(lds.ProductID) as product_id
,prd.LongDescription as product
,lower(lds.DispositionID) as disposition_id
,dsp.Disposition as disposition
,lower(lds.BranchID) as branch_id
,brn.LongName as branch
,lower(lds.LeadSubSourceID) as lead_subsource_id
,srs.LeadSubSource as lead_subsource
,lower(srs.LeadSourceID) as lead_source_id
,srs.SourceCode as lead_sourcecode
,lds.EntryDate as entry_date
,lds.DateEntered as date_entered
,lds.[EverSet] as ever_set
,lds.[EverVerified] as ever_verified
,lds.[EverIssued] as ever_issued
,lds.[EverNetIssued] as ever_net_issued
,lds.[EverSat] as ever_sat
,lds.[EverConfirmed] as ever_confirmed
,lds.LastCallDate as last_call_date
,clr.CallResult as last_call_result
,lds.[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank] as leadscore_expected_value_rank
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy] as leadscore_initial_likelihood_to_buy
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount] as leadscore_initial_likely_sale_amount
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue] as leadscore_initial_expected_value
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy] as leadscore_current_likelihood_to_buy
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount] as leadscore_current_likely_sale_amount
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue] as leadscore_Current_expected_value
,cast(getdate() as DATE) as bulk_upload_date
FROM
EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
inner join EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER cst
on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join EDW.DIM_PRODUCT prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION dsp
on lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
left join EDW.DIM_BRANCH brn
on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
left join EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs
on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
left join EDW.DIM_CALL_RESULT clr
on lds.LastCallResultID = clr.CallResultID
WHERE
lds.Division = 'FHI'
and DATEDIFF(HOUR,lds.DateEntered,GETDATE()) <= (24*90)
order by 
lds.EntryDate asc
,lds.LastCallDate asc
